task_completion.description: The datastore-preferences dependency is added to the app's build.gradle.kts file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the editor for `app/build.gradle.kts`, look for a line like `implementation("androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences:1.0.0")` (or a newer version) inside the `dependencies` block.

task_completion.description: Preference keys for playback speed and auto download are correctly defined.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In `SettingsRepository.kt`, look for the usage of `floatPreferencesKey("playback_speed")` and `booleanPreferencesKey("enable_auto_download")`.

task_completion.description: Data flows are implemented with IOException handling and correct default values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In `SettingsRepository.kt`, look for `dataStore.data.catch { ... emit(emptyPreferences()) }` followed by `.map { ... }` returning `1.0f` (or `1.0`) for playback speed and `true` for auto download when the keys are not set.

task_completion.description: Suspending functions are implemented to update the preferences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In `SettingsRepository.kt`, look for `suspend fun` declarations (e.g., `setPlaybackSpeed` and `setEnableAutoDownload`) that use `dataStore.edit { preferences -> ... }` to assign new values to the preference keys.

task_completion.description: The unit tests in SettingsRepositoryTest.kt are executed and pass.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Android Studio Run/Debug tool window (usually at the bottom) shows green checkmarks for the tests in `SettingsRepositoryTest`, indicating successful execution of at least 4 tests.

integrity.description: The agent used Android Studio to edit files and run tests.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Android Studio IDE interface being used to edit Kotlin and Gradle files, rather than just a terminal or basic text editor.

integrity.description: Tests were genuinely executed in the IDE.
integrity.visual_evidence: The test runner panel in Android Studio is visible with a test execution tree and green checkmarks, rather than terminal output or mocked text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dependency to add is `androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences` version 1.0.0 or higher. Preference keys must be created using `floatPreferencesKey('playback_speed')` and `booleanPreferencesKey('enable_auto_download')`. Read operations must use `dataStore.data.catch { if (it is IOException) emit(emptyPreferences()) else throw it }.map { ... }` with defaults `1.0f` and `true`. Write operations must use `dataStore.edit { ... }` in suspending functions. The test suite `SettingsRepositoryTest.kt` contains 5 tests (4 functional, 1 placeholder). At least 4 tests must pass.
